spanGrp.span: They say a ǧinn lived in the wādi so they escaped
in that time there was not funeral gathering
was there funeral gathering befor Abu ***?
wherever they where, they bury him
I mean, why did they leave?
no no, this is not correct
no, another thing I heard, they said, when the dead dies, they do not take it from the front of th tent, they take it from the back, is this right?
Fine, how about the poems about Bani Ṣaxar?
look, al-Mḥayḏ̣ar is in Wādi Sirḥān
if it is said to you, if it is said to you male camel, look it is from the camels
their names, their names, names of the she.-camels
they, their colors, it is not just one
no, no, the ṣafra is the normal, the ṣafr, the color is yellow
the yellow she camel... that does not...
they call it šagḥa, and... and that
now, the black from the maǧāhim, the malḥa is like the raven, this is malḥa, and there is ṣafra, that is ...
this is a relative, what is the name of your brother who stayed in ʕIrāg?
the green tatoo this is beauty, beauty
